references.reason: The terrace keeps Tenshi high above a split lower step so spectacle and the blocked working route are readable in one 1-bit frame.
A broad diagonal crack interrupts three otherwise regular stair treads, making the access problem readable without damage spectacle.
A small loaded cart stopped before the crack proves the tremor interrupted ordinary work rather than merely marking a dramatic landing.
Three offset chalk load marks distinguish a planned repair boundary from a decorative magic circle in monochrome.
The journal records that a firm objection can address damage without treating Tenshi herself as the damage.
Three black anchor slots cross a white cloud span while an open lane stays visible beside them, separating useful construction from a spectacle.
Three spaced square sockets make the minimum stable support count legible without representing real-world engineering instructions.
A vertical plumb line and offset weather arrow distinguish a temporary wind constraint from a decorative banner in one bit.
A broad unoccupied white lane beside the span demonstrates that construction preserved public passage rather than reducing people to scenery.
The construction puzzle safely resets both underbuilding and overbuilding while retaining Tenshi's engineering judgment.
The journal records a working bridge, shared constraints, and a lane that stays open without requiring applause.
